text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
<chrname> has finally earned the
right to participate in the Twinkle Star Climax!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sharing in the joy with Reporter Otonashi, I come
to learn about her extraordinary passion for the
Twinkle Star Climax.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants people to see the moment a truly
talented Umamusume proves her strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My desire to prove that <chrname> is
the greatest grows even stronger.
